mapper.sql: SELECT o.id, o.code, o.sc_id, o.customer_id, o.saler_id, o.total_num, o.total_gift_num, o.total_amount, o.description, o.create_by, o.create_time, o.update_by, o.update_time, o.approve_by, o.approve_time, o.status, o.refuse_reason FROM tbl_sale_order AS o

SELECT o.id, o.code, o.sc_id, o.customer_id, o.saler_id, o.total_num, o.total_gift_num, o.total_amount, o.description, o.create_by, o.create_time, o.update_by, o.update_time, o.approve_by, o.approve_time, o.status, o.refuse_reason, d.id AS detail_id, bundle.main_product_id AS detail_main_product_id, d.product_id AS detail_product_id, d.sku_id AS detail_sku_id, sku.code AS detail_sku_code, sku.sale_property_text AS detail_sale_property_text, p.code AS detail_product_code, p.name AS detail_product_name, c.name AS detail_category_name, brand.name AS detail_brand_name, p.spec AS detail_spec, p.unit AS detail_unit, ps.stock_num AS detail_stock_num, main_product.name AS detail_main_product_name, d.order_num AS detail_order_num, d.ori_price AS detail_ori_price, d.tax_price AS detail_tax_price, d.discount_rate AS detail_discount_rate, d.is_gift AS detail_is_gift, d.tax_rate AS detail_tax_rate, d.description AS detail_description, d.order_no AS detail_order_no, d.tax_amount AS detail_tax_amount FROM tbl_sale_order AS o LEFT JOIN tbl_sale_order_detail AS d ON d.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN tbl_sale_order_detail_bundle AS bundle ON bundle.order_id = o.id AND bundle.product_detail_id = d.id LEFT JOIN base_data_product AS p ON p.id = d.product_id LEFT JOIN base_data_product_sku AS sku ON sku.id = d.sku_id LEFT JOIN base_data_product_category AS c ON c.id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN base_data_product_brand AS brand ON brand.id = p.brand_id LEFT JOIN tbl_product_stock AS ps ON ps.sku_id = d.sku_id AND ps.sc_id = o.sc_id LEFT JOIN base_data_product AS main_product ON main_product.id = bundle.main_product_id

SELECT s.id AS id, s.id AS sku_id, g.id AS product_id, g.code AS code, s.code AS sku_code, s.sale_property_text, g.name, c.id AS category_id, c.name AS category_name, b.id AS brand_id, b.name AS brand_name, g.spec, g.unit, sale.price AS sale_price, ps.stock_num AS stock_num, g.sale_tax_rate, g.available FROM base_data_product AS g INNER JOIN base_data_product_sku AS s ON s.product_id = g.id INNER JOIN base_data_product_sku_sale AS sale ON sale.id = s.id LEFT JOIN base_data_product_category AS c ON c.id = g.category_id LEFT JOIN base_data_product_brand AS b ON b.id = g.brand_id LEFT JOIN tbl_product_stock AS ps ON ps.sku_id = s.id AND ps.sc_id = #{scId} LEFT JOIN recursion_mapping AS rm ON rm.node_id = c.id and rm.node_type = 2
mapper.select: SELECT o.id, o.sc_id, o.customer_id, o.saler_id, d.id AS detail_id, b.main_product_id AS detail_main_product_id, d.product_id AS detail_product_id, d.sku_id AS detail_sku_id, sku.code AS detail_sku_code, sku.sale_property_text AS detail_sale_property_text, p.code AS detail_product_code, p.name AS detail_product_name, c.name AS detail_category_name, brand.name AS detail_brand_name, p.spec AS detail_spec, p.unit AS detail_unit, ps.stock_num AS detail_stock_num, main_product.name AS detail_main_product_name, d.order_num AS detail_order_num, d.ori_price AS detail_ori_price, d.tax_price AS detail_tax_price, d.discount_rate AS detail_discount_rate, d.is_gift AS detail_is_gift, d.tax_rate AS detail_tax_rate, d.description AS detail_description, d.order_no AS detail_order_no, d.out_num AS detail_out_num FROM tbl_sale_order AS o LEFT JOIN tbl_sale_order_detail AS d ON d.order_id = o.id AND d.order_num > d.out_num LEFT JOIN tbl_sale_order_detail_bundle AS b ON b.order_id = o.id AND b.product_detail_id = d.id LEFT JOIN base_data_product AS p ON p.id = d.product_id LEFT JOIN base_data_product_sku AS sku ON sku.id = d.sku_id LEFT JOIN base_data_product_category AS c ON c.id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN base_data_product_brand AS brand ON brand.id = p.brand_id LEFT JOIN tbl_product_stock AS ps ON ps.sku_id = d.sku_id AND ps.sc_id = o.sc_id LEFT JOIN base_data_product AS main_product ON main_product.id = b.main_product_id WHERE o.id = #{id}

AND ( g.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition}, '%') OR g.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition}, '%') OR s.id IN (SELECT sc.sku_id FROM base_data_product_sku_code sc WHERE sc.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition}, '%')) )
AND g.product_type = 1
AND g.available = TRUE AND s.available = TRUE
ORDER BY g.code

AND ( g.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{vo.condition}, '%') OR g.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{vo.condition}, '%') OR s.id IN (SELECT sc.sku_id FROM base_data_product_sku_code sc WHERE sc.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{vo.condition}, '%')) )
AND b.id = #{vo.brandId}
AND (c.id = #{vo.categoryId} OR FIND_IN_SET(#{vo.categoryId}, rm.path))
AND g.product_type = 1
AND g.available = TRUE AND s.available = TRUE
ORDER BY g.code
